name: @axe-core/playwright
purpose: Automated WCAG 2.1 A/AA accessibility scanning in the Playwright browser test suite (tests/browser/a11y.spec.ts). Test-only tooling; never bundled into the shipped site.
licenseEvidence: npm registry metadata from `npm view @axe-core/playwright version license repository.url time --json` reported license `MPL-2.0`, repository `git+https://github.com/dequelabs/axe-core-npm.git`, and publish time for 4.12.1 of 2026-06-23T15:31:17.929Z.
wellKnownEvidence: axe-core is Deque Labs' widely-adopted, industry-standard accessibility testing engine; @axe-core/playwright is its official Playwright integration. Accessibility scanning is part of the web-game QA scope in AGENTS.md and the web-game-qa skill.
